texts.label: text
texts.orig: Borana Lodge is dedicated to the sustainable conservation of land and wildlife. Our holistic approach commits all retained earnings to building local livelihoods and enhancing ecosystem integrity.
texts.text: Borana Lodge is dedicated to the sustainable conservation of land and wildlife. Our holistic approach commits all retained earnings to building local livelihoods and enhancing ecosystem integrity.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All rates below are inclusive of a 24% non-commissionable contribution to Borana Conservancy's environmental and social responsibilities, replacing the traditional 'conservation fee'.
texts.text: All rates below are inclusive of a 24% non-commissionable contribution to Borana Conservancy's environmental and social responsibilities, replacing the traditional 'conservation fee'.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Click here for more information on the impact of each guest's stay
texts.text: Click here for more information on the impact of each guest's stay

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: * Inclusive rate accounts for accommodation cost and a 24% contribution to conservation.
texts.text: * Inclusive rate accounts for accommodation cost and a 24% contribution to conservation.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: ** Inclusive rate accounts for net accommodation cost and a 24% contribution to conservation.
texts.text: ** Inclusive rate accounts for net accommodation cost and a 24% contribution to conservation.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All prices in USD
texts.text: All prices in USD

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Minimum two night stay in standard season, three night stay in peak season.
texts.text: Minimum two night stay in standard season, three night stay in peak season.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Peak stays: 15th June -30th September 2025, 20th December 2025 - 5th January 2026 Standard stays: 6th January -14th June 2025, 1st October -19th December 202
texts.text: Peak stays: 15th June -30th September 2025, 20th December 2025 - 5th January 2026 Standard stays: 6th January -14th June 2025, 1st October -19th December 202

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Child rate applies to those from 5 to 15 years at the time of travel.  Children under 5 years stay free of charge.
texts.text: Child rate applies to those from 5 to 15 years at the time of travel.  Children under 5 years stay free of charge.

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Includes:
texts.text: Includes:

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Mandatory per person donation to conservation AMREF flying doctors cover Full board accommodation Soft drinks, beers, house wines & selected house spirits Local airstrip transfers (Borana Conservancy & Lewa Downs) All Borana Conservancy based activities: day & night game drives, horse riding, mountain biking, eBiking, bush walks, 'behind the scenes of conservation' activities, tours of Waitabit Farm and sundowner excursions. Visit to Kisima Floriculture project.
texts.text: Mandatory per person donation to conservation AMREF flying doctors cover Full board accommodation Soft drinks, beers, house wines & selected house spirits Local airstrip transfers (Borana Conservancy & Lewa Downs) All Borana Conservancy based activities: day & night game drives, horse riding, mountain biking, eBiking, bush walks, 'behind the scenes of conservation' activities, tours of Waitabit Farm and sundowner excursions. Visit to Kisima Floriculture project.

texts.orig: Additional costs per person: Afternoon departure with lunch - $80 Guide / pilot accommodation (excluding conservation fee) - $300 Visit to Ngare Ndare Forest - $40 per adult, $5 per vehicle Visit Lewa Wildlife Conservancy - $160 per adult, $80 per child Fly Camping set up fee per group - $600
texts.text: Additional costs per person: Afternoon departure with lunch - $80 Guide / pilot accommodation (excluding conservation fee) - $300 Visit to Ngare Ndare Forest - $40 per adult, $5 per vehicle Visit Lewa Wildlife Conservancy - $160 per adult, $80 per child Fly Camping set up fee per group - $600

texts.label: text
texts.orig: Adventures across Northern Kenya on horseback, e-bike, helicopter and fixed-wing aircraft can be arranged. Price on request.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: TERMS AND CONDITIONS
texts.text: TERMS AND CONDITIONS

texts.label: text
texts.orig: By creating a booking at Borana Lodge you are agreeing to the terms and conditions below.
texts.text: By creating a booking at Borana Lodge you are agreeing to the terms and conditions below.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: New Bookings
texts.text: New Bookings

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Please send an email to bookings@borana.co.ke. Your booking will be held provisionally for 5 working days. The expiry date of the booking will be noted on the reservations summary. Provisional bookings are required to be confirmed before the expiry date or it will expire. Expiry dates may be extended twice maximum on request.
texts.text: Please send an email to bookings@borana.co.ke. Your booking will be held provisionally for 5 working days. The expiry date of the booking will be noted on the reservations summary. Provisional bookings are required to be confirmed before the expiry date or it will expire. Expiry dates may be extended twice maximum on request.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · A booking will only be confirmed on receipt of a deposit and receipt of the following information: Date, time and method of guests arrival and departure.
texts.text: A booking will only be confirmed on receipt of a deposit and receipt of the following information: Date, time and method of guests arrival and departure.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Number of people traveling and room requirements.
texts.text: Number of people traveling and room requirements.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Names and ages of all guests traveling.
texts.text: Names and ages of all guests traveling.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Special dietary requirements or requests.
texts.text: Special dietary requirements or requests.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: Proof of residency if request Kenyan resident rates.
texts.text: Proof of residency if request Kenyan resident rates.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · A 20% non-refundable deposit (of the total cost inclusive cost) is required to confirm the booking.
texts.text: A 20% non-refundable deposit (of the total cost inclusive cost) is required to confirm the booking.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · The remaining 80 % balance is due 45 days prior to the arrival date.
texts.text: The remaining 80 % balance is due 45 days prior to the arrival date.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Taxes
texts.text: Taxes

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All costs inclusive of VAT and taxes.
texts.text: All costs inclusive of VAT and taxes.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Cancellation Policy
texts.text: Cancellation Policy

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All cancellations are to be made in writing and will only be put in to affect on receipt of written notice.
texts.text: All cancellations are to be made in writing and will only be put in to affect on receipt of written notice.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Exceeding than 45 days prior to arrival, 20% deposit and bank charges are forfeited.
texts.text: Exceeding than 45 days prior to arrival, 20% deposit and bank charges are forfeited.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Between 45 days and 30 days prior to arrival, 50% of the full value is forfeited.
texts.text: Between 45 days and 30 days prior to arrival, 50% of the full value is forfeited.

texts.label: list_item
texts.orig: · Less than 30 days and no-shows, 100% of the full value is forfeited.
texts.text: Less than 30 days and no-shows, 100% of the full value is forfeited.

texts.label: section_header
texts.orig: Insurance
texts.text: Insurance

texts.label: text
texts.orig: All guests who visit Borana Lodge are required to have fully comprehensive travel and medical insurance to cover cancellation, medical expenses, personal possessions and money. In the event of increase in taxes, training levy, services charges, Borana Lodge reserves the right to adjust all contract rates accordingly from the date of such change, without prior notice. Please also note that all transport costs quoted in these pages are to be used as guidelines and must be checked before final quotation. Transport costs may be quoted from a third party and are subject change ahead of confirmation without prior notice.
texts.text: All guests who visit Borana Lodge are required to have fully comprehensive travel and medical insurance to cover cancellation, medical expenses, personal possessions and money. In the event of increase in taxes, training levy, services charges, Borana Lodge reserves the right to adjust all contract rates accordingly from the date of such change, without prior notice. Please also note that all transport costs quoted in these pages are to be used as guidelines and must be checked before final quotation. Transport costs may be quoted from a third party and are subject change ahead of confirmation without prior notice.
